props.items:
[
  {
    "id": "sessions_grid",
    "type": "grid",
    "props": {
      "columns": "1",
      "rows": "111",
      "gap": "md",
      "items": "[
  {
    "id": "sessions_header",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session Summaries",
      "color": "primary",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "1",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-bad-news-and-a-wild-goose-chase_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 26 -- Bad News & A Wild Goose Chase",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "2",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-bad-news-and-a-wild-goose-chase_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Grim news came that Phira had been seized by the Cloak of Defiance and was being taken to the Shadow Sovereign in Basctdelm. They secured the silver dragon scale from Lady Rook, bartered for an arcane sigil to reach Basctdelm, uncovered troubling drow threads from Ys'nonterien, and sent the Arnol to safety while Diverra's guidance through Aury turned them away from direct confrontation with the Cloak and toward the one remaining threat in Emberstran. At the sealed cult hideout they faced a zombie beholder and a vampire who whispered of Countess Nas Verdidra while sinking her fangs into Ains and draining his vitality, until steel, daylight, and rage ended the creatures in fire and ash. The session closed with Zabeek's voice echoing through their fading telepathic bond that a mysterious stranger had just given him a ruby ring.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "3",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-26-bad-news-and-a-wild-goose-chase_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 26 -- Bad News & A Wild Goose Chase Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/10MQYSzjLJSa_SxdvkJRnYAR4--q3C0U1/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "4",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-grief-stricken_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 25 -- Grief Stricken",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "6",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-grief-stricken_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party entered the Emberheart Vault, faced trials and a spectral guardian, met Irragosa, and returned to Emberstran carrying grim news from Ulgrey.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "7",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-25-grief-stricken_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 25 -- Grief Stricken Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/14mhqvZK3AC_uuAKw5WJCI_4lqlRH6KtB/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "8",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-let-the-bodies-hit-the-floor_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 24 -- Let the Bodies Hit the Floor",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "10",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-let-the-bodies-hit-the-floor_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The heroes followed the Emberheart Tablet through Mount Emberstran, survived a firenewt ambush, sheltered with rock gnomes, and opened a dark corridor ahead.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "11",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-24-let-the-bodies-hit-the-floor_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 24 -- Let the Bodies Hit the Floor Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZzXPud0FSxftE09a9c8xb-tNLX8slE1h/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "12",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-into-the-fire_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 23 -- Into the Fire",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "14",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-into-the-fire_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party continued towards Mount Emberstran via the right-hand trail, seeking the source of the tablet's pull and deeper answers about the mountain's secrets, Irragosa, and the ancient journal's revelations. They encountered the bronze dragon Irragosa herself, who tasked Ky'tha with watching Ains, shared cryptic assurances, then departed. After camp reflections and minor combats with dire wolves and fire beetles, they reached the volcano's immense lava-filled heart, diplomatically appeased a towering flaming giant through tribute and sacrifice, then crested an embankment to witness a terrified gnome fleeing a warband of newt-like humanoids.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "15",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-23-into-the-fire_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 23 -- Into the Fire Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/19z_5aw6xUyOIg4v86jNPPjpl3JDC1HuN/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "16",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-tracker_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 22 - The Tracker",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "18",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-tracker_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The Heroes of Emberstran pressed along the Old Trader's Trail toward Mount Emberstran and the Emberheart Vault. They witnessed a bronze dragon rip a flying ship from the sky and forded a boiling river teeming with fire-scaled fish using ropes. There they exposed an invisible tracker, the wood elf Petal, who admitted serving Lady Rook to ensure their success. After a tense nighttime warning and her return at a trail fork the next morning, Zymve ended her with a swift dagger to the throat. They continued toward the mountain, now one day closer but carrying fresh doubts about their hidden patron.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "19",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-22-the-tracker_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 22 - The Tracker Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YNN63xR_Z9rzv3bb1ONdX5_JjSdvVgtH/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "20",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-he-ate-a-baby_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 21 - He Ate a Baby!",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "22",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-he-ate-a-baby_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The heroes woke in the Temple of Diverra, still reeling from the Marrowstone ritual that left Ainslie suspiciously youthful. Their goal was to head north toward Mount Emberstran. Ky'tha reminded them of their promise to Lady Rook, which they managed a convenient excuse to delay. The party secured discounted supplies with their blessed badges, bought a goat and learned rumors of the dragon. Outside the gate the goat transformed into a sturdy gertot. A red rider delivered a threat from Jerik before Og and Ainslie struck him down, with Ainslie declaring the man 'ate a baby' to calm onlookers. They fought off quaraths on the Old Trader's Trail, then camped under the stars until a huge dragon's roar woke them at dawn as it soared toward a flying ship in the sky.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "23",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-21-he-ate-a-baby_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 21 - He Ate a Baby! Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/19m1KxptZNCjhYJjWvZbY5VSxOOX0sNft/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "24",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-coming-home_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 20 - Coming Home",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "26",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-coming-home_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "Returning to home, the party wanted to see how the city of Emberstran was holding up, find clues to get to the Emberheart Vault and bring their new companion Zymve into the community. They secured critical information from Lady Rook about combining the stone with Imonorra's rod to unleash the Marrowstone's necrotic power. After tense discussions about the moral risks of using the Marrowstone against the Cloak of Defiance, the group committed to the plan, thinking the rewards outweighed the risks. A hunter at the Warm Bear Inn provided key information about getting to Mount Emberstran to search for the Emberheart Vault. Things took an unexpected turn, when Ainslie was able to focus on the Marrowstone, extracting its deadly energy and leaving the stone empty.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "27",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-20-coming-home_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 20 - Coming Home Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-BZtPtPU5zcfnYhmUUZPJnAcUG1TRKEl/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "28",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-lost-sanctuary_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 19 - Lost Sanctuary",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "30",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-lost-sanctuary_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "After pressing onward from the fungal tunnels of Thallgrove, the party followed their map marker through the Underdark with one main goal, to reach the Lost Sanctuary. They arrived at a blood-red lake, activated an ancient stone gate using Aury's divine power, and stepped through into a hidden surface grove. There they fought a fierce battle against corrupting blights, ultimately prevailing. In the aftermath, Og received a powerful calling as the thorn-bearer and guardian of the Alferumn with instructions to seek Dandelia of the Veil, while Aury gained the original Bloom Aeterna tome, leaving the group with renew purpose.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "31",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-19-lost-sanctuary_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 19 - Lost Sanctuary Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1niG6tI0aW1zZUI1F6WMZUaoLc9K6_tgC/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "32",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-in-bimblefol_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 18 - In Bimblefol",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "34",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-in-bimblefol_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party had an escort through Thallgrove and a clue about the location of the Lost Sanctuary of Diverra. Following the genling, Makra, the party's trek was interrupted by two deadly Thall Mounds. Surviving a brutal fight that nearly claimed Og, the party carried two fallen genlings back to their hidden village. In Bimblefol, they gained the trust of the genlings, secured a fungal map marking the sanctuary's direction, and traded for water breathing supplies necessary for the journey ahead. By the end of the session, the party had clear direction, new provisions, and confirmation that reaching the sanctuary would require passing through deep water and deeper dangers.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "35",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-18-in-bimblefol_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 18 - In Bimblefol Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MSe5VhZsU7APOCNiU0KuzhImCG13jOYf/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "36",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-giant-s-silver_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 17 - Giant's Silver",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "38",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-giant-s-silver_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party set out to earn additional favor in Nunglthil by dealing with stone giants who had seized a fishing hole on Lake Rothenloch. Negotiations failed, leading to a brutal fight that ended with both giants dead and the discovery of a rich silver ore deposit beneath the lake. The party harvested the silver, gained favor with multiple enclaves by restoring access to the lake, and sold the ore for coin and standing. They then secured passage across Rothenloch toward Thallgrove, where the lake's ominous presence made itself known and their journey ended with the discovery of dead adventurers and a cautious alliance with a genling guide.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "39",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-17-giant-s-silver_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 17 - Giant's Silver Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-6SX3BEDsJWSUzt3aE4I6dbT-FmD3Qc4/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "40",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-favor-in-nunglthil_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 16 - Favor in Nunglthil",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "42",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-favor-in-nunglthil_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "After returning from the Spitespirit Cache with valuable gems, the party set out to convert their success into something that mattered in Nunglthil: visible favor. They secured their first favor beads from Coppereyes, learned how reputation functions as currency in the Underdark, and began positioning themselves with multiple enclaves. Along the way, they gathered crucial leads, including maps toward a lost Diverra sanctuary, confirmation that a drowned waypoint once existed beneath Lake Rothenloch, and new personal threads tied to Shadowtrail and a mysterious journal linked to Tsulanan. By the end of the session, the party had earned standing, opened several new paths forward, and accepted that every opportunity in Nunglthil comes with an attached obligation.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "43",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-16-favor-in-nunglthil_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 16 - Favor in Nunglthil Recording",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1T4i2KxHaC7H3jn1kgWfhZZXnzirQkTUS/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "44",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-the-spitespirit-cache_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 15 - The Spitespirit Cache",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "46",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-the-spitespirit-cache_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party entered Nunglthil with the clear goal of earning favor in a city where reputation mattered more than coin. They accepted a dangerous job to recover the contents of the Spitespirit Cache, knowing success would establish them as capable and reliable outsiders. The expedition led them through lethal traps and into a sealed chamber where they were forced to fight a powerful guardian bound to the cache. Against the odds, the party prevailed, claimed the hidden treasure, and emerged with both valuable spoils and the opportunity to secure their first real standing within Nunglthil.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "47",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-the-spitespirit-cache_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 15 - The Spitespirit Cache Recording 1",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kaCJDPd8czzy4ijO_MNqucJCP2xRyj2D/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "48",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-15-the-spitespirit-cache_recording_2",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 15 - The Spitespirit Cache Recording 2",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1O1dyUdjhslQozHjBrN3vQVSyoVAhCpWy/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "50",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-the-drowned-waypoint_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 14 - The Drowned Waypoint",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "52",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-the-drowned-waypoint_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party sought to escape the tightening political pressure of Emberstran and follow Diverra's hidden waypoint. The divine circle carried them far from the surface world, depositing them beneath the sea and into an ancient, long abandoned route. After navigating hostile creatures and treacherous terrain, the party emerged onto a vast underground lake and made contact with a ferryman who led them toward Nunglthil, an Underdark outpost where new dangers and opportunities awaited.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "53",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-the-drowned-waypoint_recording_1",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 14 - The Drowned Waypoint Recording 1",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kaCJDPd8czzy4ijO_MNqucJCP2xRyj2D/view?usp=sharing",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "54",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-14-the-drowned-waypoint_recording_2",
    "type": "media-player",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 14 - The Drowned Waypoint Recording 2",
      "src": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Kzja3tPdqg0RnoicFz2h5Ir5q3LktJum/view?usp=drive_link",
      "mediaType": "auto",
      "caption": "",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "56",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "2",
      "displayMode": "image-button",
      "image": "/images/dragon-ears.png"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-13-the-emberheart-tablet_title",
    "type": "header",
    "props": {
      "title": "Session 13 -The Emberheart Tablet",
      "color": "gold",
      "size": "md",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "58",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "session-13-the-emberheart-tablet_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party sought to assemble and understand the Emberheart Tablet while navigating growing pressure from Emberstran's shadow networks. Across town, the Thornleaf reacted strongly, binding more deeply to Og and hinting at a connection to the Alferumn. At the same time, Ky's ties to the Etterset sharpened, making it clear the group was now being watched, weighed, and quietly invested in by powers that thrived on leverage. When the tablet awakened and attuned to Aury, its message pointed unmistakably toward Mount Emberstran, confirming that the path forward would lead away from city politics and into something far older and more dangerous.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "59",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }

    "id": "session-12-the-eradic-of-ghone_summary",
    "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party worked to stabilize their position in Emberstran while deciding how deeply to involve themselves with the city's competing power blocs. They gathered information from allies, questioned cult activity tied to Ghone, and tried to understand how far the Cloak and other shadowed forces had already spread. Og and Ainslie infiltrated the Eradic of Ghone under false pretenses, uncovering a hidden operation beneath the cemetery and securing a crucial tablet piece without triggering open conflict. By the end of the session, they had weakened the cult's position, completed the tablet set, and stepped more firmly into Emberstran's political and spiritual crosscurrents, knowing neutrality was becoming harder to maintain.",
      "col": "1",
      "row": "65",
      "colSpan": "1",
      "rowSpan": "1"
    }

    "props": {
      "content": "The party clashed directly with agents of the Cloak of Defiance, exposing surveillance, deception, and covert manipulation within the city. A violent confrontation revealed that the Cloak had been listening, watching, and preparing for escalation. In the aftermath, the party gained powerful items but also became persons of interest. By session's end, it was clear that neutrality was becoming harder to maintain.",

      "content": "Seeking legitimacy and leverage, the party navigated early political pressure and learned they were being quietly evaluated by powerful factions.     "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party followed leads connected to a tainted vineyard and a suspicious murder tied to Emberstran's social elite.     "type": "text",
    "props": {
      "content": "The party arrived in Emberstran seeking work and quickly became involved in an investigation along the docks after reports of violence and strange activity. What initially appeared to be a mundane disturbance revealed signs of something unnatural, including parasitic creatures and reanimated corpses. The party destroyed the threat and ensured the dead were properly burned, preventing further spread. This first job established their reputation and hinted that darker forces were already at work beneath the city.",
